title: Mole Men Against the Son of Hercules
writer: Antonio Leonviola, Giuseppe Mangione, Marcello Baldi
actors: Mark Forest, Moira Orfei, Paul Wynter
plot: Maciste arranges for himself and his new friend Bangor to be captured by a mysterious band of white-clad marauders and taken to an underground city. There the two are forced to turn an enormous wheel along with other captives as p...
